datasheet.name: Chaos Land Raider
datasheet.lore: The Chaos Land Raiders used by the Emperor’s Children are massive armoured transports whose hulls are decorated with the vibrant iconography of Dark God and Legion. These tracked monstrosities purr and thrum with pleasure as they unleash booming volleys of destruction with their array of heavy weapons, stopping only to disgorge bands of warriors into the midst of the fighting.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Chaos Land Raider**

**This model is equipped with:** 2 soulshatter lascannons; twin heavy bolter; armoured tracks.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.rules: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

datasheet_rules.name: Transport
datasheet_rules.rules: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** models. Each **TERMINATOR** and **FLAWLESS BLADE** model takes up the space of 2 models.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ This model can be equipped with one of the following:
◦ 1 combi-bolter
◦ 1 combi-weapon
■ This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model can be equipped with one of the following:
This model can be equipped with one of the following:
This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.

datasheet.name: Chaos Rhino
datasheet.lore: Eager and impetuous of spirit, Emperor’s Children Chaos Rhinos roar with barely contained anticipation as they thunder into the midst of battle to unload their cargo of warriors. Their garishly adorned hulls quiver with a perverse thrill in response to each impact upon their reinforced hulls as pintle‑mounted guns unleash spiteful volleys of destruction into the ranks of the enemy.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Chaos Rhino**

**This model is equipped with:** combi-bolter; armoured tracks.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Firing Deck 2
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, each time this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot, if one or more units are embarked within it, resolve the following sequence:

1. Select up to X models embarked within this TRANSPORT (excluding models whose units have already been selected to shoot this phase).

2. For each selected model, select one of its ranged weapons (excluding [ONE SHOT] weapons).

3. Until this TRANSPORT has resolved all of its attacks, it has all of those selected weapons in addition to its other weapons.

4. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within this TRANSPORT are <u>not</u> eligible to shoot.
abilities.lore: Some transports have dedicated platforms or firing ports from which embarked passengers can lay down a withering hail of munitions

abilities.name: Assault Vehicle
abilities.rules: Units can disembark from this **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.

datasheet_rules.name: Transport
datasheet_rules.rules: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN INFANTRY** models (excluding **TERMINATOR** and **FLAWLESS BLADE** models).

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ This model can be equipped with one of the following:
◦ 1 combi-bolter
◦ 1 combi-weapon
■ This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher or can replace 1 combi-bolter with 1 havoc launcher.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model can be equipped with one of the following:
This model can be equipped with one of the following:
This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher or can replace 1 combi-bolter with 1 havoc launcher.

datasheet.name: Chaos Spawn
datasheet.lore: For those amongst the Emperor’s Children who fall short of perfection, spawndom awaits. Chaos Spawn of Slaanesh hurl themselves into battle with reckless abandon, quivering with delight as they tear their opponents apart with mutant claws and sinuous tentacles.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **2 Chaos Spawn**

**Every model is equipped with:** hideous mutations.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abilities.rules: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.
abilities.lore: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

abilities.name: Scuttling Horrors
abilities.rules: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6”.

datasheet.name: Chaos Terminators
datasheet.lore: Clad in baroque, embossed and gilt Terminator armour, these mighty champions are confident in their superiority, displaying masterful bladework and peerless marksmanship honed by millennia of pitiless slaughter. Their heavy weapons and devastating firepower can spell doom for enemy elite units and war machines alike.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Terminator Champion**
■ **4 Chaos Terminators**

**Every model is equipped with:** combi-bolter; accursed weapon.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Lethal Obsession
abilities.rules:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, you can use this ability. If you do, select one enemy unit hit by those ranged attacks. Until the end of the turn, when this unit **declares a charge**:

■ This unit can re-roll that **charge roll**.

■ This unit <u>must</u> end that **charge move engaged** with that enemy unit.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ 1 Chaos Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 heavy flamer
◦ 1 reaper autocannon
■ Any number of models can each have their combi-bolter replaced with 1 combi-weapon.
■ 1 model’s combi-bolter and accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 paired accursed weapons.
■ Up to 3 models can each have their accursed weapon replaced with 1 power fist.
■ 1 model’s accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 chainfist.

wargear_options.instructionText: Any number of models can each have their combi-bolter replaced with 1 combi-weapon.
1 model’s combi-bolter and accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 paired accursed weapons.
Up to 3 models can each have their accursed weapon replaced with 1 power fist.
1 model’s accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 chainfist.
1 Chaos Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with one of the following:
1 Chaos Terminator’s combi-bolter can be replaced with one of the following:
Any number of models can each have their combi-bolter replaced with 1 combi-weapon.
1 model’s combi-bolter and accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 paired accursed weapons.
Up to 3 models can each have their accursed weapon replaced with 1 power fist.
1 model’s accursed weapon can be replaced with 1 chainfist.

datasheet.name: Daemonettes
datasheet.lore: Known to mortals as the handmaidens of Slaanesh, these daemons are a mixture of the beautiful and the monstrous, made all the more disturbing by the visceral clash of both. They delight in the carnage of battle, weaving around enemies’ clumsy blows as they shrill and sigh their delight amidst swift-taloned slaughter.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Alluress**
■ **9 Daemonettes**

**Every model is equipped with:** slashing claws.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Fights First
abilities.rules:
While every model in a unit has this ability, that unit is a Fights First unit.

See the Resolve Fights First Combats step in the Fight phase (12.04).
abilities.lore: Those possessed of lightning‑fast reactions may strike before the opponent can react.

abilities.name: Horrifying Beauty
abilities.rules: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if that enemy unit is Below Half‑strength.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ 1 Daemonette that is not equipped with a daemonic icon can be equipped with 1 instrument of Chaos.
■ 1 Daemonette that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos can be equipped with 1 daemonic icon.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.
Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

wargear_options.instructionText: 1 Daemonette that is not equipped with a daemonic icon can be equipped with 1 instrument of Chaos.
1 Daemonette that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos can be equipped with 1 daemonic icon.

datasheet.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
datasheet.lore: Possessed of an arrogance borne of infernal power and physical perfection, Daemon Princes of Slaanesh pride themselves upon their martial prowess. Skilled warriors armed with a variety of hellforged weapons, they seek to test themselves against the greatest champions, mortal or otherwise, leaving a tapestry of broken corpses and crimson gore in their wake.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Daemon Prince of Slaanesh**

**This model is equipped with:** infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Lord of Excess
abilities.rules: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **SLAANESH INFANTRY** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Excessive Vigour
abilities.rules: While a friendly **SLAANESH** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Ecstatic Death
abilities.rules: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

datasheet.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings
datasheet.lore: Only the most debased, conceited and skilled warriors of the Emperor’s Children achieve daemonhood. Of these, a scant few are blessed with winged daemonic forms that enhance their already potent destructive power and open them to sensation beyond the ken of mortal minds. Thus do they eagerly seek battle, longing to inflict and experience the most exquisite of agonies.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings**

**This model is equipped with:** infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

models.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

miniatures.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Daemonic Destruction
abilities.rules: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each of this model’s remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abilities.name: Stimulated by Pain
abilities.rules: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

wargear_options.miniatureName: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings
Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

datasheet.name: Fiends
datasheet.lore: Few daemonic entities approach the sheer disturbing horror of the Fiends of Slaanesh. Malicious hunting beasts that croon their delight across the battlefield, these ghastly abominations are wreathed in a soporific musk that leaves their prey witless and helpless before their flashing talons and stabbing tails.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Blissbringer**
■ **2-5 Fiends**

**Every model is equipped with:** barbed tail and dissecting claws.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Soporific Musk
abilities.rules: Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

datasheet.name: Flawless Blades
datasheet.lore: These cruel and arrogant warriors are consumed by pride in their own skill at arms. Granted power by daemonic patrons, the Flawless Blades strive to entertain their malefic masters with superlative swordplay and by inflicting vile and visceral death upon their foes.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **3‑6 Flawless Blades**

**Every model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; blissblade.

abilities.name: Daemonic Patrons
abilities.rules: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound. At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

datasheet.name: Fulgrim
datasheet.lore: Fulgrim embodies the depravity and corruption of his once‑noble Legion. His sinuous serpentine form towers over the battlefield and moves with quicksilver speed, lashing whip and thrashing tail scattering those beguiled by the grotesque magnificence of his daemonic form. Any who possess the wherewithal to resist the Daemon Primarch’s stupefying aura are cut down with casual ease.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Fulgrim – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** malefic lash; daemonic blades; serpentine tail.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Daemonic Poisons
abilities.rules: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player’s Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Daemon Primarch of Slaanesh
abilities.rules: At the start of your opponent’s Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Daemon Primarch of Slaanesh section (see below). Until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Serpentine
abilities.rules: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

datasheet_rules.name: Supreme Commander
datasheet_rules.rules: If this model is in your army, it must be your **WARLORD**.

datasheet.name: Heldrake
datasheet.lore: The dragon-like Daemon Engines known as Heldrakes soar above the battlefield, engaging in furious duels with enemy aircraft. They pick their foes apart with obsessive precision and malicious glee. Should the sky be cleared of victims, Heldrakes immediately direct their ire towards those on the ground, descending at breakneck speed to slaughter the enemy with weapon and claw.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Heldrake**

**This model is equipped with:** Hades autocannon; Heldrake claws.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Hover
abilities.rules: Each time this unit takes to the skies (21.03), do not subtract 2" from the maximum distance.
abilities.lore: Some airborne vehicles can use vectored thrusters or anti-gravity technology to hover and skim over the battlefield, the better to hunt their prey or deploy embarked troops.

abilities.name: Airborne Predator
abilities.rules: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll two D6, adding 1 to each result if that enemy unit can **FLY**: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ This model’s Hades autocannon can be replaced with 1 baleflamer.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model’s Hades autocannon can be replaced with 1 baleflamer.

datasheet.name: Infractors
datasheet.lore: Consumed by an obsessive desire to experience sensation in all its forms, Infractors hurl themselves upon the foe with ecstatic glee. Their veins thick with an esoteric cocktail of combat stimms, they are formidable and relentlessly cruel combatants.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Obsessionist**
■ **4‑9 Infractors**

**The Obsessionist is equipped with:** bolt pistol; power sword.
**Every Infractor is equipped with:** bolt pistol; duelling sabre.

abilities.name: Scouts 6"
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Scouts X". In the Resolve Pre‑battle Abilities step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can do one of the following:
  • If that unit is in strategic reserves, you can set up that unit anywhere that is wholly within your deployment zone.
  • If that unit is wholly within your deployment zone, it can make a scout move (24.32).
  • If that unit is embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT that is wholly within your deployment zone, and if every model embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts ability, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT can make a scout move.
abilities.lore: Scouts form the vanguard of many armies. Unnoticed by the enemy, they range ahead of the main force.

abilities.name: Excessive Assault
abilities.rules: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol
■ The Obsessionist’s power sword can be replaced with 1 rapture lash.
■ 1 Infractor can be equipped with 1 icon of excess.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units that phase, the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

wargear_options.instructionText: The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol
The Obsessionist’s power sword can be replaced with 1 rapture lash.
1 Infractor can be equipped with 1 icon of excess.

datasheet.name: Keeper of Secrets
datasheet.lore: Darkly intelligent, horribly beguiling and deadly in battle, the Keepers of Secrets are the greatest champions of Slaaneshi daemon legions. Wielding unclean yet beautiful weapons and unleashing the sorcerous powers of obsession and torment, these daemons cut an elegantly hideous swathe across the battlefield.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Keeper of Secrets**

**This model is equipped with:** Phantasmagoria; snapping claws; witstealer sword.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Slaanesh
abilities.rules: While a friendly **LEGIONS OF EXCESS** unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Mesmerising Form
abilities.rules: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ This model can be equipped with one of the following:
◦ Living whip
◦ Ritual knife
◦ Shining aegis

weapon_profiles.ruleText: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model can be equipped with one of the following:
This model can be equipped with one of the following:
This model can be equipped with one of the following:

datasheet.name: Lord Exultant
datasheet.lore: Lords Exultant embody the Emperor’s Children’s obsessive desire to experience new and terrible sensations. Their enhanced forms possess all manner of sensory enhancements, allowing them to experience the thrill of battle on a level that would drive lesser mortals to insanity. With lash and pistol, they lead from the front, slaughtering their foes in exquisitely lurid fashion.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Lord Exultant**

**This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; plasma pistol; Phoenix power spear; close combat weapon.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Perfectionists
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abilities.name: Euphoric Strikes
abilities.rules: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **INFRACTORS**
■ **TORMENTORS**

datasheet_rules.name: Lord of the Host
datasheet_rules.rules: If this model is attached to an **EMPEROR’S CHILDREN BATTLELINE** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

wargear_rules.rulesText:
■ This model’s plasma pistol can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 power fist
◦ 1 rapture lash

■ This model’s Phoenix power spear can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 master‑crafted power sword 
◦ 1 screamer pistol

wargear_options.instructionText: This model’s plasma pistol can be replaced with one of the following:
This model’s plasma pistol can be replaced with one of the following:
This model’s Phoenix power spear can be replaced with one of the following:
This model’s Phoenix power spear can be replaced with one of the following:

datasheet.name: Lord Kakophonist
datasheet.lore: The Lords Kakophonist derive pleasure from auditory stimuli. Such is their singular obsession with emitting lethal sonic destruction that their entire bodies have been agonisingly sculpted to further their art. Leading bands of Noise Marines, these infernal conductors lead an orchestra of discordant and deafening slaughter.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Lord Kakophonist**

**This model is equipped with:** screamer pistol; power sword.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Obsessive Annunciation
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Doom Siren
abilities.rules: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy unit suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **CHAOS TERMINATORS**
■ **NOISE MARINES**

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ This model’s power sword can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 close combat weapon.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model’s power sword can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 close combat weapon.
This model’s power sword can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 close combat weapon.

datasheet.name: Lucius the Eternal
datasheet.lore: An arrogant slaughterer and swordmaster supreme, Lucius seeks out the most skilled of the foe’s champions, casually striking down lesser enemies that dare bar his path. Against worthy opponents, Lucius strikes with the speed of a snake, his daemonically sentient lash and blade making a mockery of the greatest warriors.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Lucius the Eternal – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** Blade of the Laer; Lash of Torment.

abilities.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abilities.rules: This ability always takes the form Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.
abilities.lore: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Lone Operative
abilities.rules:
Unless part of an attached unit, this unit is <u>not</u> visible to enemy models unless they are within 12" of this unit, and it cannot be targeted by [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons unless the attacking model is within 12" of this unit.

If this ability takes the form Lone Operative X", unless part of an attached unit, this unit is <u>not</u> visible to enemy models unless they are within X" of this unit, and it cannot be targeted by [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons unless the attacking model is within X" of this unit.
abilities.lore: Assassins and other covert agents are difficult to pinpoint in the storm of battle.

abilities.name: A Challenge Worthy of Skill
abilities.rules: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER, MONSTER** or **WALKER** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Duellist’s Hubris
abilities.rules: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **FLAWLESS BLADES**

datasheet.name: Maulerfiend
datasheet.lore: The Maulerfiends of the Emperor’s Children possess a ravenous appetite for carnage and are empowered by the agonies inflicted upon them. They charge recklessly into the thick of the fighting, howling with pleasure as they tear infantry apart and reduce fortifications and vehicles to molten rubble with their fists or glowing magma cutters.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Maulerfiend**

**This model is equipped with:** lasher tendrils; Maulerfiend fists.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D3
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Glutton for Punishment
abilities.rules: Each time this model makes an attack, if it is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If this model is also Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ This model’s lasher tendrils can be replaced with 2 magma cutters.

wargear_options.instructionText: This model’s lasher tendrils can be replaced with 2 magma cutters.

datasheet.name: Noise Marines
datasheet.lore: Orchestrating riotous destruction on large scales, Noise Marines saturate the war zone with piercing bursts of shattering noise, thrumming waves of aural destruction and other extreme psychosonic attacks. These hedonistic worshippers of Slaanesh are inured to most stimuli and seek to unleash the most cacophonous destruction to stir their jaded senses.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Disharmonist**
■ **5 Noise Marines**

**Every model is equipped with:** sonic blaster; close combat weapon.

abilities.name: Terrifying Crescendo
abilities.rules: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ The Disharmonist’s sonic blaster can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 power sword.
■ Up to 2 Noise Marines can each replace their sonic blaster with 1 blastmaster.

wargear_options.instructionText: Up to 2 Noise Marines can each replace their sonic blaster with 1 blastmaster.
The Disharmonist’s sonic blaster can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 power sword.
The Disharmonist’s sonic blaster can be replaced with 1 screamer pistol and 1 power sword.

datasheet.name: Seekers
datasheet.lore: Sat astride swift Steeds of Slaanesh, Seekers pursue their mortal prey with obsessive delight. Even the fastest of mortal vehicles cannot outpace these vicious entities, while those who stand and fight soon find their ranks smashed asunder by charging shock cavalry drawn from the darkest depths of nightmare.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Heartseeker**
■ **4-9 Seekers**

**Every model is equipped with:** lashing tongue; slashing claws.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: Scouts 9"
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Scouts X". In the Resolve Pre‑battle Abilities step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can do one of the following:
  • If that unit is in strategic reserves, you can set up that unit anywhere that is wholly within your deployment zone.
  • If that unit is wholly within your deployment zone, it can make a scout move (24.32).
  • If that unit is embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT that is wholly within your deployment zone, and if every model embarked within that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts ability, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT can make a scout move.
abilities.lore: Scouts form the vanguard of many armies. Unnoticed by the enemy, they range ahead of the main force.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.rules: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ 1 Seeker that is not equipped with a daemonic icon can be equipped with 1 instrument of Chaos.
■ 1 Seeker that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos can be equipped with 1 daemonic icon.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.
Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

wargear_options.instructionText: 1 Seeker that is not equipped with a daemonic icon can be equipped with 1 instrument of Chaos.
1 Seeker that is not equipped with an instrument of Chaos can be equipped with 1 daemonic icon.

datasheet.name: Defiler
datasheet.lore: Monstrous bio-mechanical Daemon Engines, Defilers are possessed of an insuppressible thirst for souls and lust for lurid slaughter. They are relentless in their pursuit of gratification, obliterating targets in tempests of gunfire and wading into enemy formations to rip warriors to shreds with their clanking claws.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Defiler**

**This model is equipped with:**  1 Hades battle cannon; 2 excruciator cannons; 1 heavy missile launcher; 1 heavy baleflamer; 1 shearing claws.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Revel in Desecration
abilities.rules: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is not below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ This model’s Hades battle cannon can be replaced with 1 ectoplasma destructor.
■ This model’s excruciator cannons can be replaced with 2 magma cutters.

■ This model’s heavy baleflamer can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 Hades lascannon
◦ 1 heavy reaper autocannon
◦ 1 electroscourge (a model cannot be equipped with more than one electroscourge

■ This model’s heavy missile launcher can be replaced with one of the following:
◦ 1 Hades lascannon
◦ 1 heavy reaper autocannon
◦ 1 electroscourge (a model cannot be equipped with more than one electroscourge

datasheet.name: Shalaxi Helbane
datasheet.lore: Cloven hooves pounding against broken earth, Shalaxi Helbane bears down upon its doomed quarry with the Soulpiercer gleaming in its grip. No prey can evade the Monarch of the Hunt, for the daemon’s obsession with its victim is so singular and so powerful that no mortal means of flight could ever escape it.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Shalaxi Helbane – EPIC HERO**

**This model is equipped with:** lash of Slaanesh; Pavane of Slaanesh; snapping claws; Soulpiercer

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6
abilities.rules:
This ability always takes the form Deadly Demise X. Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, after the units embarked within it (if any) have made their emergency disembark moves, roll one D6. On a 6, that model suffers a deadly demise; each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by X (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

Example: An Impulsor with a unit of Intercessors embarked within it is destroyed by ranged attacks. First, any unresolved attacks made by the attacking unit are resolved. Then the Intercessors make an emergency disembark move. Then the roll is made for the Deadly Demise ability, and on a 6, that ability is resolved. Finally, the Impulsor is removed from the battlefield.
abilities.lore: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

abilities.name: Deep Strike
abilities.rules: Each time this unit makes an ingress move (20.04), if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units, even if that is within your opponent’s deployment zone.
abilities.lore: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

abilities.name: No Prey Can Evade
abilities.rules: You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

abilities.name: Monarch of the Hunt
abilities.rules: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s quarry.

datasheet.name: Sorcerer
datasheet.lore: The Sorcerers of the Emperor’s Children delight in nothing more than toying with their foes. They utilise their fell magicks to inflict nightmarish agonies upon the minds and bodies of the living and to mask the advance of their underlings with illusory misdirection. They delight in each gruesome kill they make, for each is an offering to Slaanesh and promises a reward of power.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Sorcerer**

**This model is equipped with:** Agonising Energies; bolt pistol; force weapon.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.rules:
Before the battle, in the Muster Armies step, for each leader and support unit in your army, you can select one friendly bodyguard unit that unit can lead. That unit will then lead that bodyguard unit for the battle and form an attached unit with it. 

Unless otherwise stated, each bodyguard unit can only have one leader unit and one support unit attached to it.

See Attached Units (19)
abilities.lore: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

abilities.name: Warped Interference
abilities.rules: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Wracking Agonies
abilities.rules: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

datasheet_rules.name: Leader
datasheet_rules.rules:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **INFRACTORS**
■ **NOISE MARINES**
■ **TORMENTORS**

datasheet.name: Tormentors
datasheet.lore: Clad in garish power armour and clutching over‑ornamented boltguns, Tormentors form the core of many Emperor’s Children warbands. Consumed by ego and desire, Tormentors are aggressive front‑line troops who prioritise aggression and speed, always seeking new and greater experiences and revelling in the gory deaths they inflict upon their enemies.
datasheet.unitComposition:
■ **1 Obsessionist**
■ **4‑9 Tormentors**

**The Obsessionist is equipped with:** bolt pistol; power sword.
**Every Tormentor is equipped with:** boltgun; close combat weapon.

abilities.name: Infiltrators
abilities.rules: During deployment, if every model in a unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from your opponent’s deployment zone and all enemy units.
abilities.lore: Many armies employ reconnaissance units who can sit concealed, waiting for the right moment to strike.

abilities.name: Objective Defiled
abilities.rules: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

wargear_rules.rulesText: ■ The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
■ The Obsessionist’s power sword can be replaced with 1 rapture lash.
■ For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Tormentor’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 meltagun.
■ For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Tormentor’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 plasma gun.
■ 1 Tormentor can be equipped with 1 icon of excess.

weapon_profiles.ruleText: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit destroyed one or more enemy units that phase, the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

wargear_options.instructionText: The Obsessionist’s bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
The Obsessionist’s power sword can be replaced with 1 rapture lash.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Tormentor’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 meltagun.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Tormentor’s boltgun can be replaced with 1 plasma gun.
1 Tormentor can be equipped with 1 icon of excess.
